query:
ALTER TABLE venue_settings
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS internalName VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notificationEmail VARCHAR(320),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS addressLine1 VARCHAR(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS addressLine2 VARCHAR(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suburb VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS state VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS postcode VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'New Zealand',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timezone VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Pacific/Auckland',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventTimeStart VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '08:00',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventTimeEnd VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '22:00',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS minGroupSize INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS autoCancelTentative INT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bannerImageUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS venueType VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS priceCategory VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '$$$',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS aboutVenue TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS minEventDuration VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '1 hour',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS maxEventDuration VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '6 hours',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS minLeadTime VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '1 week',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS maxLeadTime VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '6 months',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bufferTime VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '30 minutes',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS operatingHours TEXT;
command:

ALTER TABLE venue_settings
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS internalName VARCHAR(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notificationEmail VARCHAR(320),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS addressLine1 VARCHAR(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS addressLine2 VARCHAR(500),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS suburb VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS state VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS postcode VARCHAR(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'New Zealand',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timezone VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'Pacific/Auckland',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventTimeStart VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '08:00',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventTimeEnd VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '22:00',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS minGroupSize INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS autoCancelTentative INT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bannerImageUrl TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS venueType VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS priceCategory VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT '$$$',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS aboutVenue TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS minEventDuration VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '1 hour',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS maxEventDuration VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '6 hours',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS minLeadTime VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '1 week',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS maxLeadTime VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '6 months',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS bufferTime VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '30 minutes',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS operatingHours TEXT;
